privileged_info_summary: The EColi FoodHistory dataset is an example/teaching dataset (not real outbreak data) that comes with Epi Info 7 official software. It contains hamburger consumption (HAMBURGER), illness status (ILLDUM), age (AGENUM), sex (SEX), and onset date (ONSETDATE) fields. The 2x2 contingency table analysis using the TABLES command will produce odds ratio, 95% confidence interval, chi-square statistic, and p-value to test association between HAMBURGER exposure and ILLDUM outcome. The dataset record count of 359 is stated in task setup documentation but could not be independently verified through public sources.
